pages.text: This section covers changes you can make that affect how Craft Tracker determines the best recipe for making something in the queue.$(br2)Configuration values in this section are integers that set the cost of a recipe's ingredient.

pages.title: Tags
pages.text: This is a set of key/value mappings for tags that are applied to an ingredient.$(br2)Ingredients may have multiple tags, in which case, Craft Tracker will use the highest value when determining an ingredient's cost.

pages.title: Overrides
pages.text: This is a set of key/value mappings for specific items.$(br2)If you want to make sure that an item has a specific cost, add an entry here with the item's mod ID and item ID, and a value for the cost of the item. This will override any cost determined by the item's tags.
